title: 🔥MVRV远逊上轮同期，周期盈利加速崩塌
body: 市场处于周期盈利深度衰退阶段。核心看MVRV，当前仅1.22，低于历史80%的时间，远逊于上轮周期同期2022-04的1.69。BTC下探至$66,168，7日跌5.2%，导致链上浮盈大幅萎缩。与历史对比，流动性收缩迫使市场给出更极端的低估定价，长线筹码严重承压。整体判断偏空。这种跨周期的估值坍缩何时见底？
title_en: 🔥 MVRV Far Behind Last Cycle, Cycle Profits Collapsing Rapidly
body_en: The market is in a deep stage of cycle profit recession. The core indicator to watch is MVRV, currently at only 1.22, lower than 80% of historical time, far behind the 1.69 in the same period of the last cycle in 2022-04. BTC has dropped to $66,168, down 5.2% in 7 days, leading to a significant shrinkage in on-chain floating profits. Compared to history, the contraction of liquidity has forced the market to offer more extreme undervaluation pricing, putting serious pressure on long-term holdings. Overall, the judgment is bearish. When will this cross-cycle valuation collapse bottom out?
